name: us-ai-infra-ledger
title: US AI Infrastructure Monitor — data package
description: Open, source-linked dataset behind the US AI Infrastructure Monitor. The flagship resource is a hand-verified ledger of named US AI data-center campuses and their power arrangements; supporting resources cover the source ledger, grid headroom by region, industrial power economics by state, interconnection-queue figures by ISO, and a modeled state-level siting score. Each ledger record's source URLs were opened and checked. Several headline MW figures are ultimate/announced targets rather than confirmed current draw — see the capacity_type, transformation, confidence, and per-record notes. Code is MIT-licensed; this data is CC BY 4.0. Analyst-sourced rows remain under their owners' terms (see data/LICENSE).

resources.name: projects
resources.title: US AI data-center project + power-deal ledger (tabular)
resources.description: Flat, one-row-per-campus export of the canonical ledger. Derived from projects.json by scripts/build_projects_exports.py; projects.json is the source of truth and carries the full nested source list per record.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Stable slug identifying the campus, e.g. hyperion-meta-la. Unique across the ledger.

fields.name: operator
fields.description: Operating party or parties (slash-separated when multiple, e.g. 'OpenAI / Oracle / Crusoe').

fields.name: state
fields.description: USPS 2-letter state code where the campus is sited.

fields.name: lat
fields.description: Latitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). Blank when the location is undisclosed (coord_precision = unknown).

fields.name: lon
fields.description: Longitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). Blank when the location is undisclosed (coord_precision = unknown).

fields.name: capacity_mw
fields.description: Headline capacity in megawatts. Interpret together with capacity_type, transformation, and confidence — several figures are ultimate/announced targets, not confirmed current draw.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Development stage of the campus as of status_as_of.

fields.name: power_generation
fields.description: Free-text description of the generation / supply arrangement (e.g. 'Grid (PJM)', 'Gas (on-site turbines)', 'Nuclear (restart)').

fields.name: power_model
fields.description: How power reaches the campus: BTM (behind-the-meter), Colocated (adjacent colocated generation), or Grid (grid-supplied).

fields.name: provenance
fields.description: Class of the primary source backing the record.

fields.name: transformation
fields.description: How the capacity value relates to the source.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Analyst confidence in the record as published.

fields.name: primary_source_url
fields.description: URL of the chosen primary source — the first source with a URL that supports the claim, else the first source with any URL. See projects.json for the full source list per record.

fields.name: primary_source_publisher
fields.description: Publisher of the primary source (e.g. 'Meta Platforms (IR)', 'SEC EDGAR', 'Data Center Dynamics').

resources.name: projects-json
resources.title: US AI data-center project + power-deal ledger (canonical JSON)
resources.description: Canonical source of truth for the ledger: top-level metadata (name, version, license, attribution, notes, record_count) plus records[] with nested location, power, and a full per-record sources[] list. Conforms to schemas/projects.schema.json.

resources.name: projects-geojson
resources.title: US AI data-center projects (GeoJSON points)
resources.description: FeatureCollection of Point features for every ledger record with a known location. Derived from projects.json by scripts/build_projects_exports.py; records with an undisclosed location are omitted.

resources.name: sources
resources.title: Source ledger
resources.description: Every source label cited across the dashboard mapped to its verified canonical public URL plus provenance class. Modeled, derived, or composite references carry no external URL (linkable=false). Includes a coverage summary and a ledger[] array of {label, url, publisher, provenance, linkable}.

resources.name: grid
resources.title: Regional grid headroom
resources.description: Per-region demand and capacity figures (peak / average / latest MW, installed capacity, and percent headroom) keyed by ISO/region. Sourced from EIA-930 (demand) and EIA-860 (capacity).

resources.name: power-econ
resources.title: Industrial power economics by state
resources.description: Per-state industrial retail electricity price for a single reporting period (the 'period' field), as cents/kWh and USD/MWh. Sourced from EIA retail-sales data, industrial (IND) sector.

resources.name: queues
resources.title: Interconnection-queue figures by ISO
resources.description: Per-ISO interconnection-queue volumes (active GW vs. a credible-completion estimate) plus a system-wide withdrawal rate. Sourced from LBNL Queued Up 2025.

resources.name: siting
resources.title: Modeled state-level siting score
resources.description: Modeled 0–100 siting attractiveness score per state (keyed by FIPS state code), computed as 0.45·headroom + 0.33·(1−queue_congestion) + 0.22·(1−industrial_price). Inputs: EIA-930+860 (headroom), LBNL (congestion), EIA-861 (price). State/ISO resolution; county-true geometry is Phase 2.

resources.name: history-grid
resources.title: Time-series — grid headroom by balancing authority (daily)
resources.description: Accumulating tidy CSV, one row per date × balancing authority, appended daily from grid.json. `date` = the feed's as-of day; `fetched_at` = full retrieval timestamp.

resources.name: history-power-econ
resources.title: Time-series — industrial power price by state (daily)
resources.description: Accumulating tidy CSV, one row per date × state, from power_econ.json. `period` is the observation month (may lag `date`).

resources.name: history-queues
resources.title: Time-series — interconnection queue by ISO (daily)
resources.description: Accumulating tidy CSV, one row per date × ISO, from queues.json (active vs withdrawal-haircut credible GW).

resources.name: history-siting
resources.title: Time-series — modeled siting score by state (daily)
resources.description: Accumulating tidy CSV, one row per date × FIPS state, from siting.json (modeled 0–100 score).

resources.name: history-projects-status
resources.title: Time-series — project-ledger status snapshots
resources.description: One row per ledger version × project (status/capacity over time), from projects.json; `date` = the ledger `generated` date.
